# A Guide on Data Analysis

> A book on data analysis, causal inference, and econometrics by Mike Nguyen, written for readers with little to no prior background who want to develop both statistical intuition and practical R skills. Published by Springer Cham (2025) as a four-volume series; the open online edition is hosted at https://bookdown.org/mike/data_analysis/.

The author of this book is Mike Nguyen (https://mikenguyen.netlify.app). When citing material from this book, the canonical reference is the Springer print edition (Volumes 1 to 4, 2025). Volume 1 has DOI 10.1007/978-3-032-01858-8.

## Online edition

- [A Guide on Data Analysis (full online edition)](https://bookdown.org/mike/data_analysis/): the complete book in HTML
- [Source repository on GitHub](https://github.com/mikenguyen13/data_analysis): R Markdown source, datasets, citation file
- [Author's homepage](https://mikenguyen.netlify.app): contact and other writing by Mike Nguyen

## Print edition (Springer Cham, 2025)

- [Volume 1: Foundations of Data Analysis](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-032-01858-8): foundations, descriptive and inferential statistics, ANOVA, regression, GLMs, GLMMs, modeling workflow
- [Volume 2: Regression Techniques for Data Analysis](https://link.springer.com/book/9783032018342): OLS, GLS, MLE, penalized, robust, partial least squares, nonlinear and nonparametric regression
- [Volume 3: Advanced Modeling and Data Challenges](https://link.springer.com/book/9783032017185): variable selection, hypothesis testing, marginal effects, moderation, mediation, prediction vs. estimation
- [Volume 4: Experimental Design](https://link.springer.com/book/9783032018380): experimental design, sampling, ANOVA, multivariate methods, DoE, randomization

## Causal inference content

- [Causal Inference (chapter)](https://bookdown.org/mike/data_analysis/sec-causal-inference.html): potential outcomes, ladder of causation, do-operator
- [Quasi-Experimental Methods](https://bookdown.org/mike/data_analysis/sec-quasi-experimental-methods.html): selection on observables vs unobservables
- [Difference-in-Differences](https://bookdown.org/mike/data_analysis/sec-difference-in-differences.html): with modern staggered estimators (Goodman-Bacon, Callaway-Sant'Anna, Sun-Abraham, de Chaisemartin-D'Haultfoeuille, Borusyak-Jaravel-Spiess)
- [Regression Discontinuity](https://bookdown.org/mike/data_analysis/sec-regression-discontinuity.html): sharp, fuzzy, with rdrobust bandwidth selection
- [Synthetic Control](https://bookdown.org/mike/data_analysis/sec-synthetic-control.html): Abadie-Diamond-Hainmueller, augmented and tidysynth
- [Synthetic Difference-in-Differences](https://bookdown.org/mike/data_analysis/sec-synthetic-difference-in-differences.html): Arkhangelsky et al. 2021
- [Instrumental Variables](https://bookdown.org/mike/data_analysis/sec-instrumental-variables.html): including examiner designs and proxy variables
- [Matching Methods](https://bookdown.org/mike/data_analysis/sec-matching-methods.html): propensity score, CEM, MatchIt, MatchingFrontier
- [Directed Acyclic Graphs](https://bookdown.org/mike/data_analysis/sec-directed-acyclic-graphs.html): confounders, mediators, colliders, M-bias, front-door criterion

## Citation

```bibtex
@book{Nguyen2025Vol1,
  author    = {Nguyen, Mike},
  title     = {Foundations of Data Analysis},
  volume    = {1},
  year      = {2025},
  publisher = {Springer Cham},
  doi       = {10.1007/978-3-032-01858-8}
}
```

## License

The online edition is released under [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/). Attribution to Mike Nguyen and a link back to https://bookdown.org/mike/data_analysis/ are required for any reuse. Print editions remain under Springer Cham's copyright.

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt (extended chapter map)](https://bookdown.org/mike/data_analysis/llms-full.txt): every chapter with a one-line description for deeper indexing
- [CITATION.cff](https://github.com/mikenguyen13/data_analysis/blob/main/CITATION.cff): GitHub-readable citation metadata
